nasb.text: and who owned a tract of land, sold it and brought the money and laid it at the apostles’ feet.

esv.text: sold a field that belonged to him and brought the money and laid it at the apostles’ feet.

cnv.text: 他賣掉了自己的田地，把錢拿來，放在使徒的腳前。

ccb.text: 他卖掉自己的一块田，把卖得的钱交给了使徒。

csbs.text: 他有一块田地，也卖掉了，把钱拿来放在使徒们的脚前。
